theme_and_archetype.vibe: Trustworthy, grounded, warm, premium. Moving away from cold, clinical SaaS blues. Designing for trust (KYC, payments) and home (warmth).
core_principles: Trust via Clarity: Heavy use of white space, crisp typography, and unambiguous verified badges.
Tactile Surfaces: Use flat cards with 1px borders instead of generic drop shadows to feel grounded and solid.
Contextual Friction: Easy property discovery, but intentional friction (blur, premium UI) for unlocking contacts to validate payment.

typography.font_loading_instructions: Import Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare (https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@100,200,300,400,500,700,800,900&display=swap). Use Manrope from Google Fonts.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-forest

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Default section padding is py-24. Container max-width is max-w-7xl.

grids.marketing_bento: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Hero images span 8 cols, text spans 4 cols.
grids.property_gallery: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4. Main image col-span-8 row-span-2, side images col-span-4 row-span-1.
grids.dashboard_control_room: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Sidebar col-span-3, Main content col-span-9. Tight gaps (gap-6).

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Subtle. Use rounded-xl for main containers, rounded-md for inner elements like buttons and inputs. Avoid completely pill-shaped buttons unless it's a floating search bar.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D26955] text-white hover:bg-[#B85542] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1F2B24] border border-[#E6E2D8] hover:bg-[#FAF9F6] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-[#EEF2ED] text-[#5C7658] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards_property.style: Cardless aesthetic. Flat background, no outer shadow. border border-[#E6E2D8] rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

locked_contact_module.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-[#E6E2D8] bg-[#FAF9F6] p-6
locked_contact_module.blur_layer: absolute inset-0 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/60 flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-10
locked_contact_module.unlock_cta: bg-[#1F2B24] text-white shadow-xl flex gap-2 items-center px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-black transition-all

kyc_badge.style: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#EEF2ED] text-[#5C7658] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-[#5C7658]/20

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-white border border-[#E6E2D8] rounded-md px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D26955]/20 focus:border-[#D26955] text-[#1F2B24] placeholder:text-[#8A948F]

landing_and_search.header: Sticky crystal glass nav (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E6E2D8]).
landing_and_search.hero: Left-aligned massive typography ('Find a home, not a hustle'). Right-aligned dynamic masonry of property images. Floating search bar overlapping the bottom of the hero.
landing_and_search.search_filters: Horizontal scrollable pill-based filters (City, Rent, BHK, Furnishing) below the search bar.
landing_and_search.property_list: CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4) with generous gap-8.

property_detail.layout: Top: Breadcrumbs. Next: Tetris Grid Image Gallery (Max height 60vh to prevent overwhelming). Below: 2-column layout (col-span-8 for descriptions, amenities, map; col-span-4 for sticky Action Card).
property_detail.action_card: Sticky sidebar card containing Rent, Security Deposit, Visit Booking Calendar button, and the Razorpay Locked Contact Module.

owner_listing_wizard.steps: 1. Essentials (Type, Title, Rent, Address). 2. Photos (Drag & Drop area). 3. Details (BHK, Furnishing).
owner_listing_wizard.note: Optional details (Amenities, Rules) moved to a 'Enhance Listing' post-publish state in the Owner Dashboard.

kyc_verification_flow.layout: Dedicated focus page (no main nav, just a 'Back to Dashboard' link). High-trust UI.
kyc_verification_flow.elements: File upload zones with dashed borders. Secure lock icons. Live camera capture block for selfie.

dashboards_tenant_owner.tenant_tabs: Saved Properties, Unlocked Contacts, Visit Requests, Subscription Status.
dashboards_tenant_owner.owner_tabs: My Properties, Visit Inbox, KYC Status.
dashboards_tenant_owner.cards: Listings shown in dense list view (row-based) rather than grid to optimize for data scanning.

admin_panel.layout: Dense Control Room Grid. High contrast sidebar.
admin_panel.features: Tables (Shadcn) for Properties (Approve/Reject/Suspend), KYC Reviews, Users, Payments.
admin_panel.status: Use bright pill badges for quick scanning (Pending = Yellow, Approved = Green, Rejected = Red).

premium_pricing.cards: Yearly plan (₹799) is the hero card spanning full width, dark theme (bg-[#1F2B24] text-white) with a subtle 'Tracing Beam' border effect. Monthly (₹99) and 3-Month (₹249) cards sit side-by-side below in light theme.

hero_backgrounds.description: Modern apartment building exterior, use in landing page hero right-side bento

interiors.description: Spacious contemporary living room, use in property detail mock or featured cards

people_avatars.description: Young Indian professional, use in Owner Profile or Chat UI
Indian family, use in Testimonials or Tenant Profile

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='unlock-contact-button', data-testid='listing-submit').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #D26955 meets APCA standards. Deep green text on #FAF9F6 ensures high legibility.
accessibility_and_testing.hover_states: All buttons and cards must have explicitly defined hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#B85542] hover:-translate-y-1).

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' via Fontshare API and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Locked Contact Module' exactly as described using glassmorphism. Never leave the unblurred text in the DOM if payment is not made (security).
Use Shadcn UI extensively for Admin/Dashboard tables, dialogs, calendars, and forms, but customize the border-radius and colors to match the Earthy theme.
Ensure all API integrations for Razorpay, Auth, and listings are fully functional (no mock APIs, but use placeholder text/images ONLY from the provided media_and_images URLs).
Property Status must strictly enforce: Pending (default) -> Admin Review -> Approved/Rejected/Suspended.
